flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California State University-San Marcos rose 50% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.1k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-San Marcos rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.8k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-San Marcos fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-San Marcos rose 51% between 2021 and 2024 (18.6% → 28.0%).
